teaching.title: Physics Tutor at NIT Rourkela appointed by the Institute counseling service (ICS) for first-year undergrad students. The students are generally weaker ones who struggle with the subject and are unaware of many key concepts and principles.

pmrfTaData.head: Teaching assistant
pmrfTaData.content: of NPTEL math course called 'Calculus Of One Real Variable' (July-September, 2023) instructed by Prof. Joydeep Datta from IIT Kanpur.

pmrfTaData.head: Teaching assistant
pmrfTaData.content: of NPTEL math course called 'Integral and Vector Calculus' (Jan-April, 2023) instructed by Prof. Hari Shankar Mahato from IIT Kharagpur.

pmrfTaData.head: Transcipt of Lectures and Lecture notes
pmrfTaData.content: for NPTEL course 'Quantum Computing' part-1 (July-October 2023) instructed by Prof. Prabha Mandayam at IIT Madras.

responsibilityData.head: Teach in 10-PMRF'23 Mentoring and training member
responsibilityData.content: for 'Teach to Learn' IIT Madras program. To train rural school students on device engineering and 3D printing.

responsibilityData.head: Teaching assistant
responsibilityData.content: at IIT Madras for course 'Physics-1' instructed by Prof. Rajesh Singh.

responsibilityData.head: Teaching Physics lab assistant
responsibilityData.content: at IIT Madras for B.Tech first-year students (Jan-April, 2023).
